title: Identify and repair high strength steel vehicle components
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Identify and repair high strength steel vehicle components demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Locate OEM or authorised agency repair procedures

pcs.text: Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Source, interpret and incorporate OEM or authorised agency repair procedures into planning process1.3 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks1.4 Select and check required repair tools and equipment and personal protective equipment (PPE) for serviceability1.5 Plan work to identify required HSS repair methods, minimise waste, and use time efficiently
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Source, interpret and incorporate OEM or authorised agency repair procedures into planning process1.3 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks1.4 Select and check required repair tools and equipment and personal protective equipment (PPE) for serviceability1.5 Plan work to identify required HSS repair methods, minimise waste, and use time efficiently?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Source, interpret and incorporate OEM or authorised agency repair procedures into planning process1.3 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks1.4 Select and check required repair tools and equipment and personal protective equipment (PPE) for serviceability1.5 Plan work to identify required HSS repair methods, minimise waste, and use time efficiently.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Locate OEM or authorised agency repair procedures

elements.title: Repair or replace HSS components

pcs.text: Protect sections not subject to repair, using approved methods and equipment2.2 Identify and remove HSS sections to be replaced using OEM or authorised agency required removal methods and equipment, workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements2.3 Restore damaged surfaces to a condition suitable for fitting replacement HSS components2.4 Use vehicle measuring or jigging equipment to position replacement HSS component according to OEM or authorised agency specifications2.5 Protect or reapply OEM or authorised agency’s surface coatings2.6 Align and secure replacement HSS components within OEM or authorised agency’s tolerances
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Protect sections not subject to repair, using approved methods and equipment2.2 Identify and remove HSS sections to be replaced using OEM or authorised agency required removal methods and equipment, workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements2.3 Restore damaged surfaces to a condition suitable for fitting replacement HSS components2.4 Use vehicle measuring or jigging equipment to position replacement HSS component according to OEM or authorised agency specifications2.5 Protect or reapply OEM or authorised agency’s surface coatings2.6 Align and secure replacement HSS components within OEM or authorised agency’s tolerances?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Protect sections not subject to repair, using approved methods and equipment2.2 Identify and remove HSS sections to be replaced using OEM or authorised agency required removal methods and equipment, workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements2.3 Restore damaged surfaces to a condition suitable for fitting replacement HSS components2.4 Use vehicle measuring or jigging equipment to position replacement HSS component according to OEM or authorised agency specifications2.5 Protect or reapply OEM or authorised agency’s surface coatings2.6 Align and secure replacement HSS components within OEM or authorised agency’s tolerances.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Repair or replace HSS components

elements.title: Weld HSS components

pcs.text: Locate and check recommended welding equipment for HSS for operation3.2 Conduct sample welds using recommended repair methods, and inspect and destruction test for defects according to workplace instruction3.3 Refit HSS components using recommended repair methods, materials and equipment, and without causing damage to other systems or components3.4 Follow grinding procedures according to OEM or authorised agency and weld material specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Locate and check recommended welding equipment for HSS for operation3.2 Conduct sample welds using recommended repair methods, and inspect and destruction test for defects according to workplace instruction3.3 Refit HSS components using recommended repair methods, materials and equipment, and without causing damage to other systems or components3.4 Follow grinding procedures according to OEM or authorised agency and weld material specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Locate and check recommended welding equipment for HSS for operation3.2 Conduct sample welds using recommended repair methods, and inspect and destruction test for defects according to workplace instruction3.3 Refit HSS components using recommended repair methods, materials and equipment, and without causing damage to other systems or components3.4 Follow grinding procedures according to OEM or authorised agency and weld material specifications.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Weld HSS components

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Finish repairs to HSS components to pre-paint condition according to workplace and OEM or authorised agency repair procedures4.2 Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 4.3 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures4.4 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Finish repairs to HSS components to pre-paint condition according to workplace and OEM or authorised agency repair procedures4.2 Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 4.3 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures4.4 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Finish repairs to HSS components to pre-paint condition according to workplace and OEM or authorised agency repair procedures4.2 Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 4.3 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures4.4 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Complete work processes

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
